services.name: Album Cover Design by Hameem Bhai
services.description:
An original hand-drawn digital artwork created on iPad, blending abstract expressionism, industrial aesthetics, and psychological symbolism. The composition explores themes of chaos, isolation, ambition, destruction, and rebirth through layered imagery, fragmented structures, and a dominant red-black palette. Designed to evoke intensity and emotional depth, this piece is suitable for album covers in genres such as hip-hop, alternative, metal, industrial, dark electronic, and experimental music.

Medium: Digital Painting (iPad)
Style: Abstract / Industrial / Expressionist
Resolution: High Resolution
Rights: Commercial Use Available


*THE MARKS ARE FOR COPYRIGHT ISSUES*

services.name: Full Custom Website by Hameem Bhai
services.description:
1. The Storefront & Customer Experience
Dynamic Product Catalog: Clean grids, category filters, and tags (like ⭐ Popular or Limited Item).
Active Review & Rating System: Customers can rate products, write testimonials, and see average star ratings updated in real-time.
Wishlist System: Let customers save their favorite items to a custom list that persists across visits.
Smart Shopping Cart & Checkout:
Auto-calculates totals and delivery fees (digital vs. physical items).
Auto-applies promo codes (e.g., HBFRIEND10).
Auto-recognizes returning customers to apply special customer loyalty discounts.
Direct cash-out integration showing bKash payment details.

2. The Powerhouse: Admin Control Center
Live Order Manager: View new orders, customer contact info, check transition IDs, and change order status (Pending ➡️ Completed).
Direct WhatsApp Integration: Tap a button next to any order to immediately open a chat window with that specific customer on WhatsApp.
Interactive Inventory Controller: Add new services, edit pricing, change badges, edit features, and upload photos directly from the dashboard.
Customer List: Search and view registered customer profiles and emails.
Database Backup Utility: Export the entire store database as a JSON backup or import it to move databases instantly.

services.name: Character Sketch by Hameem Bhai
services.description: A striking, hand-drawn digital ink portrait that combines sharp, expressive black line-art with a soft, neon-pink ambient glow. It captures a moody, modern aesthetic that is perfect for personalized avatars, custom prints, or stickers.
features: Customizable background neon glow (choose your accent color).

services.name: Detailed Portrait by Hameem Bhai
services.description: A fully rendered, hand-painted digital portrait featuring rich color transitions, warm highlights, and a realistic canvas-texture background. The detailed shading on the face and hair creates a high-end, gallery-quality piece that is perfect for aesthetic wallpapers, custom gifts, or room prints.
features: Full-color rendering with facial lighting and blush details.

home.heroSubtitle: From custom lighter cases to full websites — we bring your creative ideas to life with passion, precision, and prices that won't break your wallet.

about.heroSubtitle: Discover the passion, values, and craftsmanship that drive HameemBhai er Dokan.
about.storyP1: HameemBhai er Dokan wasn't built in a boardroom — it was born from the streets of Dhaka out of a simple necessity: people need a place to show their artistic drip without paying astronomical agency fees.
about.storyP2: I'm just a simple Hameem Bhai from Dhaka, investing my time and late nights so you can flex your creative vision. Whether it's hand-crafted custom 3D lighter cases that catch eyes, coding glassmorphism websites that feel like the future, or dropping corporate posters with unmatched aesthetic — we bring that raw, unfiltered passion to everything we touch.
about.storyP3: This isn't just a transaction; it's a creative partnership. We iterate, we vibe, and we don't stop until the final product is absolute typeshit.

blogPosts.title: Custom Lighter Cases — Hameem Bhai er Dokan's Portfolio
blogPosts.author: Hameem Bhai
blogPosts.summary: Explore how Hameem Bhai er Dokan turns simple utility lighters into custom, hand-painted and 3D printed works of art directly from Dhaka.
blogPosts.content:
When it comes to flexing your own aesthetic, standard accessories just don't cut it. That's why custom lighter cases have become the ultimate statement piece in the Dhaka street style scene. At Hameem Bhai er Dokan, we treat lighter cases not just as utility items, but as miniature canvases.

Every single case in our collection is hand-crafted, painted, or 3D modeled by Hameem Bhai himself, ensuring that your lighter matches your unique vibe. Whether you are looking for a detailed anime character, minimalist typography, or intricate 3D-sculpted elements that glow under UV lights, our lighter design Dhaka studio delivers premium results. Check out Hameem Bhai er Dokan's portfolio to see how we turn everyday items into collector's editions.

blogPosts.title: Graphic Design Services — Why Hameem Bhai er Dokan Beats Templates
blogPosts.author: Hameem Bhai
blogPosts.summary: Generic templates might be fast, but they dilute your brand. Discover why custom graphic design from Hameem Bhai er Dokan is the premium choice.
blogPosts.content:
In a world flooded with generic Canva templates, standing out requires original design thinking. If you want your brand or event to make a real impact, opting for custom graphic design Dhaka is a game changer. Hameem Bhai er Dokan offers bespoke graphic assets tailored to your brand identity, moving away from cookie-cutter structures.

Every Hameem Bhai design is built from scratch with proper typography, color harmony, and a modern aesthetic. From custom logos to high-quality poster design Bangladesh, we ensure that your visuals speak directly to your target audience. Discover why collaborating with Hameem Bhai er Dokan beats basic templates every single time.

blogPosts.title: Web Development by Hameem Bhai — Modern Glassmorphism Websites
blogPosts.author: Hameem Bhai
blogPosts.summary: Ditch slow builders and bloated frameworks. Learn how Hameem Bhai crafts lightning-fast, custom glassmorphism websites.
blogPosts.content:
A website is your digital storefront, and it should look just as premium as your physical products. When it comes to web development Dhaka, the trend is moving towards ultra-clean, fast-loading, and interactive layouts. Hameem Bhai specializes in creating modern glassmorphism websites that feel premium and responsive.

Instead of bloated templates or slow WordPress setups, Hameem Bhai websites are built with vanilla code for maximum speed and SEO efficiency. By combining modern design principles with interactive cursor trails and smooth scroll reveals, Hameem Bhai er Dokan builds digital experiences that keep users engaged and convert them into buyers.

blogPosts.title: 3D Modeling from Hameem Bhai er Dokan — Creative Process & Portfolio
blogPosts.author: Hameem Bhai
blogPosts.summary: Go behind the scenes of digital sculpture prototyping, and how Hameem Bhai blends software precision with physical craftsmanship.
blogPosts.content:
Bringing physical products to life starts with digital precision. Our 3D modeling Dhaka workflow combines industrial design concepts with artistic sculpture. At Hameem Bhai er Dokan, we use advanced modeling tools to prototype custom designs before they hit the 3D printers.

Whether we are working on a custom lighter case or a bespoke product prototype, Hameem Bhai handles the entire process. From the initial 3D sketch to the final high-resolution digital sculpture, every detail is refined. Learn more about the creative process at Hameem Bhai er Dokan and view our 3D portfolio today.

blogPosts.title: Commissioning Work from Hameem Bhai er Dokan — Process & Pricing
blogPosts.author: Hameem Bhai
blogPosts.summary: A simple guide to hiring Hameem Bhai er Dokan for custom design, development, and modeling services without agency headaches.
blogPosts.content:
Commissioning custom creative work shouldn't feel like a guessing game. At Hameem Bhai er Dokan, we make the commissioning process completely transparent, simple, and affordable for startups and individuals.

Our process is split into clear phases: brief sharing, payment setup, drafts review, and final delivery. Whether you're ordering a custom website, logo, or lighter case, Hameem Bhai services are built to suit your BDT budget. Discover how Hameem Bhai er Dokan supports fellow Dhaka creatives and startup founders with premium assets.
